name: atrium-cockpit
description: Linear / PRD / sprint cockpit for Claude Code — live mock-up POC running as a VS Code extension.

atrium.openOnStartup.markdownDescription: Open the Atrium cockpit automatically as an editor tab when VS Code finishes starting. Turn off if you'd rather open it on demand via the status-bar button, the `Atrium: Open Cockpit` command, or `⌘⌥A`.

atrium.linear.apiKey.markdownDescription: Linear personal API key. When set, the cockpit pulls the board **live** from Linear on refresh; otherwise it uses the committed snapshot. Create one at [linear.app/settings/api](https://linear.app/settings/api).

atrium.linear.projectName.description: Linear project name the cockpit loads when a live API key is configured.

atrium.linear.pollSeconds.markdownDescription: Auto-refresh the cockpit from Linear every N seconds. **0 = off (default).** Only meaningful with a live API key set — try 60–300 for a gentle live sync.

scripts.build: vite build && node esbuild.host.mjs && cp src/atrium-board.json dist/
scripts.vscode:prepublish: vite build && node esbuild.host.mjs && cp src/atrium-board.json dist/
